## Summary

What does this PR change and why?

## Type of change

- [ ] New rule
- [ ] New configuration option for an existing rule
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor or internal cleanup

## Checklist

- [ ] `composer format` runs clean
- [ ] `composer analyze` passes
- [ ] `composer test` passes
- [ ] If a rule was added or changed, `docs/{RuleName}.md` is updated
- [ ] If a rule was added, `README.md` links to the new doc
- [ ] If configuration was added or changed, `config/extension.neon` is updated (parameter schema, defaults, and service registration)

## Related issues

Closes #
